retrieved_result: How Much Does an Irrevocable Trust Cost? Service Costs > How Much Does an Irrevocable Trust Cost? How Much Does an Irrevocable Trust Cost? An irrevocable trust is an estate planning arrangement that cannot be changed or altered once set up. It can help an individual avoid paying for estate and gift taxes in the future by removing property
Decision_Reason: The retrieved result discusses irrevocable trusts and estate planning, which is unrelated to Docker setup for beginners.
